mapper.sql: select id, box_id, game_id, discount_label, first_charge_domestic, first_charge_overseas, recharge_domestic, recharge_overseas, has_support, support_desc, download_url, promote_url, qrcode_url, promote_text, poster_url, promotion_links, platform_data, is_featured, is_exclusive, is_new, custom_name, custom_description, custom_download_url, view_count, sort_order, added_at, create_time from gb_box_game_relations
mapper.select: select r.id, r.box_id, r.game_id, r.discount_label, r.first_charge_domestic, r.first_charge_overseas, r.recharge_domestic, r.recharge_overseas, r.has_support, r.support_desc, r.download_url, r.promote_url, r.qrcode_url, r.promote_text, r.poster_url, r.promotion_links, r.platform_data, r.is_featured, r.is_exclusive, r.is_new, r.custom_name, r.custom_description, r.custom_download_url, r.view_count, r.sort_order, r.added_at, r.create_time, b.name as box_name, g.name as game_name from gb_box_game_relations r left join gb_game_boxes b on r.box_id = b.id inner join gb_games g on r.game_id = g.id and g.del_flag = '0' where r.box_id = #{boxId} order by r.sort_order asc, r.added_at desc

select r.id, r.box_id, r.game_id, r.discount_label, r.first_charge_domestic, r.first_charge_overseas, r.recharge_domestic, r.recharge_overseas, r.has_support, r.support_desc, r.download_url, r.promote_url, r.qrcode_url, r.promote_text, r.poster_url, r.promotion_links, r.platform_data, r.is_featured, r.is_exclusive, r.is_new, r.custom_name, r.custom_description, r.custom_download_url, r.view_count, r.sort_order, r.added_at, r.create_time, b.name as box_name, g.name as game_name from gb_box_game_relations r left join gb_game_boxes b on r.box_id = b.id left join gb_games g on r.game_id = g.id where r.game_id = #{gameId} order by r.sort_order asc, r.added_at desc

select r.id, r.box_id, r.game_id, r.discount_label, r.first_charge_domestic, r.first_charge_overseas, r.recharge_domestic, r.recharge_overseas, r.has_support, r.support_desc, r.download_url, r.promote_url, r.qrcode_url, r.promote_text, r.poster_url, r.promotion_links, r.platform_data, r.is_featured, r.is_exclusive, r.is_new, r.custom_name, r.custom_description, r.custom_download_url, r.view_count, r.sort_order, r.added_at, r.create_time, b.name as box_name, g.name as game_name from gb_box_game_relations r inner join gb_game_boxes b on r.box_id = b.id and b.del_flag = '0' left join gb_games g on r.game_id = g.id left join gb_site_box_relations box_incl on b.id = box_incl.box_id and box_incl.site_id = #{siteId} and box_incl.relation_type = 'include' left join gb_site_box_relations box_excl on b.id = box_excl.box_id and box_excl.site_id = #{siteId} and box_excl.relation_type = 'exclude' where r.game_id = #{gameId} and ( b.site_id = #{siteId} or (b.site_id = #{personalSiteId} and not (box_incl.id is null and box_excl.id is not null)) or (b.site_id != #{siteId} and b.site_id != #{personalSiteId} and box_incl.id is not null) ) order by r.sort_order asc, r.added_at desc
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_box_game_relations
id, box_id, game_id, discount_label, first_charge_domestic, first_charge_overseas, recharge_domestic, recharge_overseas, has_support, support_desc, download_url, promote_url, qrcode_url, promote_text, poster_url, promotion_links, platform_data, is_featured, is_exclusive, is_new, custom_name, custom_description, custom_download_url, view_count, sort_order, added_at, create_time,
#{id}, #{boxId}, #{gameId}, #{discountLabel}, #{firstChargeDomestic}, #{firstChargeOverseas}, #{rechargeDomestic}, #{rechargeOverseas}, #{hasSupport}, #{supportDesc}, #{downloadUrl}, #{promoteUrl}, #{qrcodeUrl}, #{promoteText}, #{posterUrl}, #{promotionLinks}, #{platformData}, #{isFeatured}, #{isExclusive}, #{isNew}, #{customName}, #{customDescription}, #{customDownloadUrl}, #{viewCount}, #{sortOrder}, #{addedAt}, #{createTime},
mapper.update: update gb_box_game_relations set box_id = #{boxId}, game_id = #{gameId}, discount_label = #{discountLabel}, first_charge_domestic = #{firstChargeDomestic}, first_charge_overseas = #{firstChargeOverseas}, recharge_domestic = #{rechargeDomestic}, recharge_overseas = #{rechargeOverseas}, has_support = #{hasSupport}, support_desc = #{supportDesc}, download_url = #{downloadUrl}, promote_url = #{promoteUrl}, qrcode_url = #{qrcodeUrl}, promote_text = #{promoteText}, poster_url = #{posterUrl}, promotion_links = #{promotionLinks}, platform_data = #{platformData}, is_featured = #{isFeatured}, is_exclusive = #{isExclusive}, is_new = #{isNew}, custom_name = #{customName}, custom_description = #{customDescription}, custom_download_url = #{customDownloadUrl}, view_count = #{viewCount}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, added_at = #{addedAt}, create_time = #{createTime} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_box_game_relations where id in
#{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT r.*, g.name as game_name, b.name as box_name FROM gb_box_game_relations r LEFT JOIN gb_games g ON r.game_id = g.id LEFT JOIN gb_game_boxes b ON r.box_id = b.id WHERE r.box_id = #{boxId} AND r.game_id IN
#{gameId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO gb_box_game_relations (box_id, game_id, sort_order, discount_label, first_charge_domestic, first_charge_overseas, recharge_domestic, recharge_overseas, has_support, support_desc, download_url, promote_url, qrcode_url, promote_text, poster_url, promotion_links, platform_data, is_featured, is_exclusive, is_new, custom_name, custom_description, custom_download_url, view_count, added_at, create_time) VALUES
(#{r.boxId}, #{r.gameId}, #{r.sortOrder}, #{r.discountLabel}, #{r.firstChargeDomestic}, #{r.firstChargeOverseas}, #{r.rechargeDomestic}, #{r.rechargeOverseas}, #{r.hasSupport}, #{r.supportDesc}, #{r.downloadUrl}, #{r.promoteUrl}, #{r.qrcodeUrl}, #{r.promoteText}, #{r.posterUrl}, #{r.promotionLinks}, #{r.platformData}, #{r.isFeatured}, #{r.isExclusive}, #{r.isNew}, #{r.customName}, #{r.customDescription}, #{r.customDownloadUrl}, #{r.viewCount}, #{r.addedAt}, #{r.createTime})

INSERT INTO gb_box_game_relations (id, box_id, game_id, sort_order, discount_label, first_charge_domestic, first_charge_overseas, recharge_domestic, recharge_overseas, has_support, support_desc, download_url, promote_url, qrcode_url, promote_text, poster_url, promotion_links, platform_data, is_featured, is_exclusive, is_new, custom_name, custom_description, custom_download_url, view_count, added_at) VALUES
(#{r.id}, #{r.boxId}, #{r.gameId}, #{r.sortOrder}, #{r.discountLabel}, #{r.firstChargeDomestic}, #{r.firstChargeOverseas}, #{r.rechargeDomestic}, #{r.rechargeOverseas}, #{r.hasSupport}, #{r.supportDesc}, #{r.downloadUrl}, #{r.promoteUrl}, #{r.qrcodeUrl}, #{r.promoteText}, #{r.posterUrl}, #{r.promotionLinks}, #{r.platformData}, #{r.isFeatured}, #{r.isExclusive}, #{r.isNew}, #{r.customName}, #{r.customDescription}, #{r.customDownloadUrl}, #{r.viewCount}, #{r.addedAt})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE box_id = IF(VALUES(box_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(box_id), box_id), game_id = IF(VALUES(game_id) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(game_id), game_id), sort_order = IF(VALUES(sort_order) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(sort_order), sort_order), discount_label = IF(VALUES(discount_label) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(discount_label), discount_label), first_charge_domestic = IF(VALUES(first_charge_domestic) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(first_charge_domestic), first_charge_domestic), first_charge_overseas = IF(VALUES(first_charge_overseas) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(first_charge_overseas), first_charge_overseas), recharge_domestic = IF(VALUES(recharge_domestic) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(recharge_domestic), recharge_domestic), recharge_overseas = IF(VALUES(recharge_overseas) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(recharge_overseas), recharge_overseas), has_support = IF(VALUES(has_support) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(has_support), has_support), support_desc = IF(VALUES(support_desc) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(support_desc), support_desc), download_url = IF(VALUES(download_url) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(download_url), download_url), promote_url = IF(VALUES(promote_url) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(promote_url), promote_url), qrcode_url = IF(VALUES(qrcode_url) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(qrcode_url), qrcode_url), promote_text = IF(VALUES(promote_text) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(promote_text), promote_text), poster_url = IF(VALUES(poster_url) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(poster_url), poster_url), promotion_links = IF(VALUES(promotion_links) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(promotion_links), promotion_links), platform_data = IF(VALUES(platform_data) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(platform_data), platform_data), is_featured = IF(VALUES(is_featured) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(is_featured), is_featured), is_exclusive = IF(VALUES(is_exclusive) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(is_exclusive), is_exclusive), is_new = IF(VALUES(is_new) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(is_new), is_new), custom_name = IF(VALUES(custom_name) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(custom_name), custom_name), custom_description = IF(VALUES(custom_description) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(custom_description), custom_description), custom_download_url = IF(VALUES(custom_download_url) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(custom_download_url), custom_download_url), view_count = IF(VALUES(view_count) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(view_count), view_count), added_at = IF(VALUES(added_at) IS NOT NULL, VALUES(added_at), added_at)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM gb_box_game_relations WHERE box_id = #{boxId} AND game_id = #{gameId}
